items.description: Sponsor Star JuliusBrussee / caveman 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

Star ansible / ansible Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com .
